message:
feat(spork/app): registry wiring with capability injection (bd-2ukjr)

Wire RegistryCap into the App layer so applications can inject a
shared name registry at construction time and have it propagated
to all child tasks via Cx.

- impl RegistryCap for NameRegistry (marker trait fulfillment)
- impl<T: RegistryCap> RegistryCap for Mutex<T> (shared mutable access)
- AppSpec::with_registry() builder, CompiledApp carries registry
- CompiledApp::start() wires registry into Cx via with_registry_handle()
- AppHandle::registry() accessor
- 5 new integration tests
- Fix 4 missing OracleViolation match arms in test files
- Update oracle count assertion 13→17

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
